lines: He gives sleep to his beloved.

Welcome to this ten-minute non-sleep deep rest protocol. [short pause] What you're about to do has been shown to increase dopamine levels by sixty-five percent, accelerate learning consolidation, and provide recovery equivalent to two to three hours of sleep. [short pause] Rest is not laziness. [short pause] It is a gift — and right now, you're going to receive it.
Find a comfortable position. [short pause] Seated or lying down. [short pause] If you're not already there, get settled now.

Throughout this protocol, breathe normally unless I tell you otherwise. [short pause] When I ask you to take a deep breath, inhale through your nose — or through your mouth if you need to — and exhale slowly through pursed lips, as if you're breathing through a thin straw.
Let's start with two of those now.
Inhale deeply through your nose... [short pause] [short pause]
And exhale slowly through pursed lips. [short pause] All the way out.
Again. [short pause] Deep inhale... [short pause] [short pause]
And a long, complete exhale. [short pause] Feel your body settling.
In your mind's eye, imagine you're standing over yourself, looking down at your body. [short pause] You're holding a spotlight. [short pause] You control where it goes.
Direct that spotlight to your feet.

Focus your attention on the bottoms of your feet. [short pause] Whatever they're touching — socks, shoes, the floor, the air. [short pause] Notice what they're sensing. [short pause] Tingling. [short pause] Warmth. [short pause] Pressure. [short pause] Numbness. [short pause] It doesn't matter what it is. [short pause] Just notice.

Now expand the spotlight. [short pause] Let it widen to include the tops of your feet. [short pause] Your ankles. [short pause] Your shins and calves. [short pause] Feel the light moving upward. [short pause] Your knees. [short pause] Your thighs. [short pause] Your hamstrings. [short pause] All the way up to your waist.
Your entire lower body is inside the beam of that spotlight now.
Take a deep breath in through your nose... [short pause] [short pause]
And exhale slowly through pursed lips.
As you exhale, imagine your lower body sinking about a centimeter into whatever surface it's resting on. [short pause] Heavy. [short pause] Warm. [short pause] Releasing.
One more breath. [short pause] Deep inhale... [short pause] [short pause]
And exhale. [short pause] Sinking a little deeper.

Now move the spotlight to your abdomen. [short pause] Focus your attention there. [short pause] As you breathe in naturally, notice your belly rise slightly. [short pause] As you breathe out, notice it fall. [short pause] Just observe. [short pause] No effort.

Expand the spotlight upward. [short pause] Your upper abdomen. [short pause] Your chest. [short pause] The gentle rise and fall. [short pause] Your ribcage expanding and contracting. [short pause] Notice but don't control.

Let the spotlight include your back now. [short pause] Whatever surface your back is touching — a chair, a mattress, a cushion — bring all of your attention to those points of contact. [short pause] Feel the pressure. [short pause] The warmth where your body meets the surface.
Take a deep breath in... [short pause] [short pause]

And exhale through pursed lips. [short pause] As you do, imagine your back and your entire upper body sinking about a centimeter deeper into the surface beneath you. [short pause] Heavy. [short pause] Supported. [short pause] Letting go.
Once more. [short pause] Inhale deeply... [short pause] [short pause]
Expand the spotlight to include your arms. [short pause] From your shoulders, down through your upper arms, your elbows, your forearms, your wrists, your hands, all the way to your fingertips.
Notice whatever your hands are touching. [short pause] The texture. [short pause] The temperature. [short pause] Just observe.

Now move the spotlight to your neck. [short pause] Your jaw. [short pause] Let your jaw hang slightly open — just release the tension there. [short pause] Your cheeks. [short pause] The area around your eyes. [short pause] Your forehead. [short pause] The top of your head. [short pause] The back of your head.
See if you can extend your exhales just slightly. [short pause] Not forcing. [short pause] Just... [short pause] [short pause] letting them be a little longer.

Now, in your mind's eye, expand the spotlight all the way down. [short pause] Your head, your neck, your chest, your arms, your abdomen, your waist, your legs, your feet. [short pause] Your entire body, illuminated inside this beam of soft light.
And now... [short pause] [short pause] slowly dim the light. [short pause] Let the spotlight become softer. [short pause] Less intense. [short pause] Like someone turning a dimmer switch down.
Take one more deep breath in... [short pause] [short pause]
And exhale completely through pursed lips.
As you do, imagine your entire body — every part of it — sinking into the surface beneath you. [short pause] Heavy. [short pause] Warm. [short pause] Completely at rest.
Stay here for a moment. [short pause] Breathing normally. [short pause] There is nothing to do. [short pause] Nothing to solve. [short pause] Nothing to plan. [short pause] You are simply resting.
Now, very gently, begin to come back.
Move your toes. [short pause] Just slightly.
Notice that you're still in control. [short pause] You can direct your body and your attention wherever you choose.
Move your ankles. [short pause] Bend your knees the smallest amount.
Shift your upper body slightly. [short pause] Side to side.
Move your head gently. [short pause] A small nod. [short pause] Side to side.
Move your fingers. [short pause] Lift your hands a tiny bit, then set them down.
And when you're ready... [short pause] [short pause] slowly open your eyes.

Your nervous system has been flooded with sensory input again — mostly visual. [short pause] You deliberately turned that off for the last ten minutes and sent your brain into a state of deep restoration.
This is the power you carry. [short pause] The ability to rest — truly rest — at will. [short pause] You chose stillness. [short pause] And it restored you.
Take this with you into whatever comes next.
